description_long: This object is a stylized broom with a robust, angular body primarily colored in orange with blue accents and scattered light blue triangular patterns. The broom features a long, straight handle that is attached to the main body via a visible hinge mechanism, allowing for potential movement or adjustment. The sweeping head is wide and flat, with a textured gray surface that mimics the appearance of dense, synthetic bristles. At the rear, the handle terminates in a squared-off end with a cross-shaped marking, possibly for hanging or mounting. The overall design is modern and somewhat mechanical, suggesting it may be part of a larger cleaning apparatus or an automated cleaning device. The construction appears solid, with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A modern, angular broom with an orange and blue body, a long straight handle, and a wide, textured gray sweeping head. The design is robust and stylized, with geometric patterns and mechanical features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat gray sweeping head and the straight handle extending directly backward, with the orange and blue body visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the length of the handle, the hinge mechanism, and the angular orange body with blue accents and triangular patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the dual cylindrical features at the back, the squared-off handle end with a cross marking, and the geometric body shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the handle, hinge, and patterned body, with the sweeping head angled away.
attribute_handle_type: The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of plastic or coated metal, with a round cross-section and a squared-off end featuring a cross-shaped marking. No visible grip enhancements or telescopic features are present.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The sweeping head has a dense, flat arrangement of synthetic bristles, appearing as a single wide, textured gray surface. The bristles are straight and uniform in length, with no visible color variation.
attribute_mounting_position: The squared-off end of the handle with a cross marking suggests it can be hung vertically on a hook or peg. No other dedicated mounting features are visible.
